BigFishOnReach: An emerald glimmer flickers beneath the surface!
BigFishOnEnd: The emerald glimmer is no more...
BigFishOnRefresh: The glimmering emerald form looms forth again!

BigFishOnReach: A heart-shaped shadow flitters through the water!
BigFishOnEnd: The heart-shaped shadow fades out of sight...
BigFishOnRefresh: The heart-shaped shadow flitters back into your field of vision!

BigFishOnReach: You are overcome with a sudden icy chill!
BigFishOnEnd: Your body warms as the chill recedes...
BigFishOnRefresh: The mysterious chill returns with an icy vengeance!

BigFishOnReach: The surrounding air begins to crackle with lightning energy!
BigFishOnRefresh: The air once again courses with lightning energy!

BigFishOnReach: A sharp, glinting form darts into view!
BigFishOnEnd: You lose sight of the glinting form...
BigFishOnRefresh: The glinting form darts sharply back into view!

BigFishOnReach: You sense a watchful gaze from beneath the water!
BigFishOnRefresh: You sense the watchful gaze fix upon you once more!

BigFishOnReach: What appears to be a nearby island writhes before your eyes!
BigFishOnEnd: The movement you sensed must have been a trick of the light...
BigFishOnRefresh: The apparent landmass once again teems with motion!

BigFishOnReach: A vibrant shadow darts through the water!
BigFishOnEnd: The vibrance fades out of sight...
BigFishOnRefresh: The vibrant shadow looms near again!
